team.name: Klaus Martiny
team.title: MD, PhD — Psychiatric Centre Copenhagen
team.affiliation: New Interventions in Depression Group (NID-Group), Copenhagen Affective Disorder Research Centre
team.bio: Leading researcher in novel depression interventions with extensive experience in light therapy and brain stimulation approaches for mood disorders.

team.name: Laura Sakalauskaitė
team.title: Industrial PhD — DTU & OptoCeutics ApS
team.affiliation: Technical University of Denmark & OptoCeutics ApS
team.bio: Designed and leads the clinical trial as part of the Horizon 2020 Astrotech project. Researches the intersection of photonics engineering and psychiatric treatment.

team.name: Paul Michael Petersen
team.title: Professor — Technical University of Denmark
team.affiliation: Department of Electrical and Photonics Engineering, DTU
team.bio: Expert in photonics engineering and light technology. Co-conceived the FELIX study approach combining light technology with psychiatric treatment.

team.name: Kamilla Woznica Miskowiak
team.title: Professor — Copenhagen University Hospital
team.affiliation: Neurocognition and Emotion in Affective Disorders (NEAD) Group, CADIC
team.bio: Designed the neurocognitive test battery for the study. Specialist in cognition and emotion in affective disorders.

study.name: FELIX
study.fullName: 40 Hz Light Neurostimulation Therapy for Depression
